name: Alligator Kids' Sleeping Bag - Pillowfort™
description: Keep your child warm and cozy while camping in the backyard or the wild with this Alligator Sleeping Bag from Pillowfort™. Made from soft fabric with ample filling to keep them nice and snug, this rectangular sleeping bag features a green and white checkered pattern and an attached alligator pillow for a cute look. The sleeping bag is designed to fit kids up to 57 inches tall and is easy to pack for convenient carrying.
